summary: The test run failed with one failing test suite; logs show a config env-variable replacement warning from src/getConfig.ts and the test command exited with code 1.
root_cause: A Jest test suite failed during CI (1 failed). The logs include a warning from src/getConfig.ts about failing to replace an environment variable (${ENV_VAR_123}), indicating the test encountered unexpected config/env behavior and caused the test run to exit non-zero.
relevant_tests: Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total

evidence.quote: Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
evidence.reason: Shows that one test suite failed in the Jest run.
Identifies a warning originating from src/getConfig.ts about failing to replace an env var, which is likely related to the test failure.
Shows the test script (jest) failed under pnpm, indicating the test run aborted with an error.
Confirms the test command exited with a non-zero status, causing the CI job to fail.
An explicit error present in the logs that may be part of the failing test behavior or related setup error observed during the run.

suggested_fix: Run the failing test locally with the same environment to reproduce; ensure the environment variable ENV_VAR_123 is set or mock the env replacement in the test (or adjust src/getConfig.ts to handle missing env vars without warning). Re-run jest and verify the suite passes before pushing.
